channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-24
item.description:
Our community has seen significant progress across multiple projects recently. The `scienceverse/metacheck` project has made notable updates, merging in branches from `scienceverse/ethics_check`, `scienceverse/prereg_regcheck`, and `scienceverse/fix/code-check-paperlist`, and fixing key issues such as code_check crashes and missing paper_ids. Meanwhile, `Davidvandijcke/coarse` has improved localization and deployment, and `JamieCummins/regcheck` has addressed important security concerns and bug fixes. Additionally, `giladfeldman/escicheck` has synced with the latest versions of `effectcheck`, bringing its `main` branch up to date. These connections and updates demonstrate the collaborative spirit and commitment to progress within our community, and we celebrate the hard work and dedication of our contributors.

93 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Most active:

coarse30 commits
regcheck30 commits
docpluck19 commits
metacheck10 commits
escicheck3 commits

item.title: metacheck: 3 commits today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

The `dev` branch received several updates, including the merge of pull requests `#316` from `scienceverse/ethics_check`, `#309` from `scienceverse/prereg_regcheck`, and `#318` from `scienceverse/fix/code-check-paperlist`. The `dev` branch also saw a fix for a code_check crash and a missing paper_id on paper lists, as described in the commit message "Fix code_check crash and missing paper_id on paper lists". The `papers_databases` branch was updated with functions to load paper databases from `scienceverse/papers`, as stated in the commit message "add functions to load paper databases from scienceverse/papers". Additionally, the `scienceverse/ethics_check`, `scienceverse/prereg_regcheck`, and `scienceverse/fix/code-check-paperlist` branches were merged into `dev`, indicating work was done on these branches before being integrated into `dev`.

3 commit(s) today:

  • e077134 [dev] Merge pull request #316 from scienceverse/ethics_check — Lisa DeBruine
  • a40d7db [dev] Merge pull request #309 from scienceverse/prereg_regcheck — Lisa DeBruine
  • 1fb2bab [dev] Merge pull request #318 from scienceverse/fix/code-check-paperlist — Lisa DeBruine

View all commits →
